title: Campus Safety
description: Jointly established by New York University and East China Normal University, NYU Shanghai is the third degree-granting campus in NYU’s global network, joining NYU Abu Dhabi and NYU's campus in New York City.
text:
Campus Safety
The NYU Shanghai Department of Campus Safety is committed to creating a safe and secure environment for students, faculty, staff, and visitors to pursue their educational and professional goals while at NYU Shanghai.
In collaboration with the Campus Safety department at NYU, local police, and authorities, we provide the services listed below, maintain order on campus, and handle emergency response and environmental health and safety issues.
Our Services
Campus Safety provides a wide range of services for students, faculty, staff, and visitors. Below, you will find useful and convenient tips and tools that will help you navigate day-to-day life on campus, and most importantly, stay safe.
Fire & Environmental Health and Safety (EHS)
Fire Safety
Be prepared to respond to fires
Environmental Health & Safety
Lab safety, guidelines, and emergency response
Emergency Response & Safety Reports
Emergencies
The Campus Safety team is here to provide 24/7 emergency support
Safety Notice
Safety-related incidents around the campus and safety advisories
Contact Us
Service Line (24/7): + 86 21 2059 5500 Email: shanghai.safety@nyu.edu Address: E118, 1F East Hall, the New Bund Campus, 567 Yangsi W Rd.
